2
Section breakdown
Content
Same as /profile ProfileHeader but isEditing=false permanently. Avatar, name, @username, bio, location. No edit button. URL copy badge. 404 empty state if username not found.

Hierarchy + Interaction
No interactive controls
Username appears as social handle
Profile URL copy badge
404: centered "Profile not found" with home link
Data deps
GET /api/scorecard/:username (no auth)
Content
ScorecardView with isPublic=true. Hides: raw data toggle, regenerate button, My Applications. Shows: score, bars, stack, web3 achievements.

Hierarchy + Interaction
Identical visual to private profile
No interactive controls beyond accordion expand
Web3 achievements especially prominent (hackathon showcase)
Data deps
Same data as S1 query — scorecard response includes all display data.

Content
Count badge in section header
Each vouch: truncated wallet, message, timestamp, Solana explorer link
Empty state: "No vouches yet. Be the first."
Interaction
Tx link opens explorer in new tab
Wallet address copy on click
Max 10 shown, "Show more" expand
Data deps
scorecard.vouches[] — from same query as S1/S2. No extra call.

Content + Steps
Step 1: Connect wallet (WalletMultiButton)
Step 2: Message textarea (optional, 280 char)
Step 3: initiateVouch() → txData
Step 4: wallet.signTransaction(txData)
Step 5: sendRawTransaction(signed)
Step 6: confirmVouch() → success
Hierarchy + Interaction
Step dots (1–6) at top
Can't self-vouch (viewer wallet === owner wallet)
Each step: loading state + error inline
Step 6 success: green checkmark + invalidate scorecard query
Data deps
POST /api/actions/vouch/:usernamePOST /api/vouch/confirm
